title: deppea scoti
side_effects: Deppea scoti can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, it can lead to respiratory problems, allergic reactions, and even liver damage. Some users have reported experiencing headaches, fatigue, and changes in appetite, which can be a result of excessive or prolonged use. Additionally, improper usage of Deppea scoti can also cause skin irritation, rashes, and inflammation, especially when applied topically or ingested in large quantities.
